decisions.title_en: Amodei pledges $200M, proposes FAA-grade AI regulation and worker support
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Anthropic released two policy proposals (govt should be able to block catastrophic-risk models, FAA/auto/drug-style testing regime) plus a $200M pledge to research AI labor-market impact and economic support for displaced workers.

decisions.title_en: Amazon borrows $17.5B for AI; Morgan Stanley sees AI debt doubling to $570B in 2026
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Concrete new financing event (Amazon $17.5B delayed-draw term loan on top of bond sale) plus a fresh Morgan Stanley forecast that AI-linked debt issuance nearly doubles to ~$570B in 2026. Distinct from prior bigtech-700b-capex-doubts (analyst sentiment, 06-04) and amazon-engineers-datacenter-protest (06-03).

decisions.title_en: OpenAI bans China-linked accounts using ChatGPT to seed US data-center/tariff narratives
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. OpenAI's new threat report details two operations ('Data Center Bandwagon', 'Tech and Tariffs') generating comics/comments to stoke US electricity-price and tariff debates; first time OpenAI sees a China-linked op targeting the AI data-center debate.

decisions.title_en: Google DeepMind releases DiffusionGemma, a 26B open text-diffusion model
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. New experimental open-weights model (26B MoE, 3.8B active) generating text via parallel diffusion over 256-token blocks, up to 4x faster (1000+ tok/s on H100), day-zero vLLM support, Apache 2.0.

decisions.title_en: Ex-xAI engineer Devin Kim sues xAI/SpaceX, alleges fired for Grok safety warnings
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Lawsuit filed in California state court Tuesday (06-09) alleging wrongful discharge/retaliation over AI-safety complaints about Grok; lands two days before SpaceX's IPO pricing.

decisions.title_en: CISA moves to a 3-day critical-vuln patch deadline, citing AI-accelerated exploitation
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. CISA shortens remediation deadline for the most critical exploited vulnerabilities to three days, explicitly citing AI models compressing the exploit window from weeks to hours.

decisions.title_en: SpaceX prices IPO today, lists tomorrow on Nasdaq
decisions.reason: Published 06-04 ('史上最大 IPO 提前开跑', fixed $135/share, $1.77T, prices 06-11 / lists 06-12). Pricing only finalizes after market close today; no substantively new facts available at research time beyond what was already published.
